blocks.translation: You hardly come home at all.

blocks.text: 선생님 께서 저녁  다  되어  가는데 전화  안  받는 다고 찾아 보라고  하셔서 ..
blocks.translation: The teacher said since it's almost evening and you’re not answering your phone, I should come look for you...

blocks.text: 내가  괜히 방해 한  거 아냐 … ?
blocks.translation: Did I just end up bothering you for no reason...?
No, I was just about to head inside.

blocks.text: 누구야 ? 우리  학교  애 는 아닌  거  같던데 ..
blocks.translation: Who is that? They don't look like they're from our school.

blocks.text: ・ 그리고  나와 묘하게  닮은 얼굴 이었다 .

blocks.translation: I don’t know. Neither do I.

blocks.text: 부산 에서 알던  사 이라 카 던데 …
blocks.translation: They said they were someone they knew from Busan...
I have no memory of it.
Auntie got me a room at a boarding house.

blocks.text: 마침 다른  편의점 에서 알바  자리 도 구 했거든요 .
blocks.translation: I also managed to get a part-time job at another convenience store.
Fortunately, it’s similar to the place I was at before.

blocks.text: 오늘  까지만 신세 지는  걸로 할게요 .
blocks.translation: I’ll only be staying till the end of today.

blocks.text: 굳이  왜 ? 여기  더  있어도 괜찮은데 ...
blocks.translation: Why bother? It’s fine if you stay here longer...

blocks.text: 니 에요 . 이미 충분히 폐  끼 쳤는데 .. 더  있을  순 어요 .
blocks.translation: It's me. I've already troubled you enough... I can't cause more.
Thank you so much for everything, teacher.

blocks.text: 부산 에서 의 둘 은  ・ ・ ・
blocks.translation:
What was the relationship
between the two in Busan...?
What kind of relationship was it?

blocks.text: 지금 까지  가장 신경 쓰이는  건 ..
blocks.translation: The thing that bothers me the most so far...

That girl who strangely
resembles me

blocks.text: 자매 라고 해도  믿을  듯한 느낌 이었지 ...
blocks.translation: I could almost believe we were sisters...
No way... could that girl just now...?
Jeong Seonhwa, why are you here?

blocks.text: 예전 부터 내게  보여준 다정한  모습 들이
blocks.translation: If all those kind moments you showed me before

blocks.text: 그  여자애 와 닮은  내  얼굴 때문 이었다면 …
blocks.translation: were because of my face, which resembles that girl’s...
I might feel a little hurt.

blocks.text: 설마 … 기억  잃은  와중에 여친  만든  거가 ? !
blocks.translation: No way... Did I get a girlfriend while I was amnesiac?!

blocks.text: go 아 .. 아니 그 등 ? ! 뭐라 노 ? !
blocks.translation: G-go... No, what the hell?! What are you saying?!

blocks.text: 가봐 라 . 니네  형 이 기다린다 는  거 같은데 .
blocks.translation: Go on. I think your brother's waiting.

blocks.text: 니네 형 한테 내  만난  건 비밀 로  하고 .
blocks.translation: Keep it a secret that you met my brother.

blocks.text: 아까  니  보고 좀  안심 했다 .
blocks.translation: I felt a bit relieved seeing you earlier.

blocks.text: 여전히 .. 예전 처 분식  싫어하는  거 보니까 ,
blocks.translation: You still hate snacks like before,

blocks.text: 기억 이 아주  사라진  게 아니라 ,
blocks.translation: so it's not like your memory's completely gone,

blocks.text: 금씩 돌아 오고  있는  거 같아서 .
blocks.translation: it seems to be coming back little by little.

blocks.text: 지금 니  이름 이 조은 이 랬나 ?
blocks.translation: Your name is Jo Eun, right?

blocks.text: 니 가  좋아 하던 바다 가 ,
니 가 좋아 하던 친구들 이 ,
날  좋아 하던  때가 다시  떠올라
blocks.translation: And the time when you loved me will return.
So... when you start missing me,
when you want to live as 'Johun',

blocks.text: 짐  빠진  거  없이 잘  챙겼나 ?
blocks.translation: Did you pack everything without leaving anything behind?

blocks.text: 뭐  다  타 버려서 짐 이랄  것도 없어 .
blocks.translation: Nothing to call luggage anyway, it all burned up.
This bag is all I've got.
Do you really have to go out?

blocks.text: 아직  느그 집 에 불  지른  놈  잡지 도 못  했다  아이 가 .
blocks.translation: You still haven't caught the bastard who set your house on fire, have you?

blocks.text: 혼자 고시원 에 있는 너무 위험 할 거 같은데 .
blocks.translation: It's way too dangerous to be alone in that boarding house.
Your little brother went through the same thing...

blocks.text: 내가  직접 담판 을 지어야 한다 .
blocks.translation: I must settle this negotiation myself.

blocks.text: 더이상  주변 에 피해 를  끼쳐 선 안돼 ...
blocks.translation: I mustn’t cause any more harm around here...

blocks.text: 내가  계속 조은  옆 에 있으면 ...
blocks.translation: If I stay by Joeun's side...

blocks.text: 결국  얘 도 다치게 만들 거야 .
blocks.translation: In the end, he'll end up getting hurt too.
Actually, I'm the one who made this,

blocks.text: ILDHONOI  LDH - INOI / L > I - ANOILD - 1

blocks.translation: I am Hwang Daehan’s older brother.

blocks.text: 제가 황 대한  형 이 시킨  일 을 거절  했거든요 .
blocks.translation: I refused the order Hwang Daehan gave me.
What exactly did he order you to do?

blocks.text: 황 대한 ㄱ 새끼  가 나 한테 ・ ・ ・
blocks.translation: That damn bastard... he did this to me...

blocks.text: 서봄  옷  벗은  거 찍어 오라고 …
blocks.translation:
Go take pictures
of Seobom undressing...
Why? Do you have something to say?

blocks.text: 뭐야 . 김성훈 ,  조영만 둘다  안  나왔냐 ?
blocks.translation: What? Neither Kim Seong-hoon nor Cho Young-man showed up?

blocks.text: 조은 . 너  걔 친하지 ? 네랑 어디  갔는지  아냐 ?
blocks.translation: Joeun, you’re close with him, right? Do you know where they went?

blocks.text: 그렇지 않아도 보냈 는데 답 이  없는 데요 .
blocks.translation: I already sent them, but there’s been no reply.

blocks.text: 겠다 . 수업  준비 들 잘  하고 .
또  저 같은 번 경우 는 아니 겠지 …
blocks.translation: It won't happen to me again, right...?

blocks.text: 이따  고시원 갈  때  같이  가자 .
blocks.translation: Let's go together when you head to the boarding house later.

blocks.text: 오늘 부터 절대  혼자 는 다니지  말고 .
blocks.translation: From now on, never go out alone.

blocks.text: 어젯밤 내가  느낀 감정 의  정체 .
blocks.translation: The feeling I sensed last night—what it really was.

blocks.text: 임마 들  전화 도 안  받노 ・ ・ ・
blocks.translation: Hey, you’re not even picking up your phone...

blocks.text: 내가  얘 를 .. 좋아 하는  건 아니야 .. 그치 .. ? !
서현  당구장 국제 식대 다이  설치 업소
blocks.translation: Seohyeon Billiards International Food Court Dai Installation Shop

blocks.text: 일단 은 정 배식  니  말 대로 하긴  했는데 ,
blocks.translation: For now, I did as you said about the meal arrangement,

blocks.text: 이런  ㅈ밥 들 잡아  족 치는  거랑
blocks.translation: Messing with these losers is just a waste of time.

blocks.text: 5 천 짜리 목  따는  거랑 뭔  상관 이냐 ?
blocks.translation: What does beheading a five-thousand currency thug have to do with this?

blocks.text: 그  목  따 려면 드업 을 잘  해야  한다고 .
blocks.translation: If you want to cut that throat, you need to be skilled at the setup.
